title: ADHES Heavy Duty Kraft Paper Tape Eco Friendly Packing Tape Writable Non-Coated Surface for Masking, Sealing, and Packaging Use,2” x 43 Yards,3Rolls
features: [heavy duty kraft tape]This paper kraft tape has a high-tensile strength so that it can be used for sealing carboard and heavy-duty packaging for moving, shipping, or long-term indoor storage.
[Recycleable and eco-friendly] Non-PE-coated,No-chemical-ink!Made with 100% kraft paper,convenient to recycle with box without seperation.
[Easy to use]Easily tears by hand and self-adheres; no water, scissors, or knives necessary!You can also use with a standard tape dispenser.
[Writable surface] Non-coated surface for pencil,pens,water-based marker pen,oily markers and more
[NO noise]Compared to transparent OPP packing tape, this kraft paper tape is noiseless to use.It is suitable to use at night or when quiet is required
